languages.text: {n}Вольный Торговец ловит ваш взгляд.{/n} "Вы предлагали выслушать свиту. Но что скажете сами? Вы тоже считаете, что с бешеным гроксом можно договориться?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Вольный Торговец ловит ваш взгляд.{/n} "Вы предлагали выслушать свиту. Но что скажете сами? Вы тоже считаете, что с бешеным гроксом можно договориться?"

languages.text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"
languages.original_text: {n}Вольный Торговец ловит ваш взгляд.{/n} "Вы предлагали выслушать свиту. Но что скажете сами? Вы тоже считаете, что с бешеным гроксом можно договориться?"

traits.locale_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"
{n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"
{n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

languages.text: {n}行商浪人捕捉到你的目光。{/n}“你建议我听听随从们的意见，那你又是什么看法呢？你也认为，和一头狂暴的格洛克斯兽谈判是可行的吗？”
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人捕捉到你的目光。{/n}“你建议我听听随从们的意见，那你又是什么看法呢？你也认为，和一头狂暴的格洛克斯兽谈判是可行的吗？”

languages.text: {n}Le regard du libre-marchand croise le vôtre.{/n} « Vous m'avez suggéré d'écouter ma suite, mais vous, qu'avez-vous à dire ? Êtes-vous aussi d'avis qu'il est possible de négocier avec un grox enragé ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard du libre-marchand croise le vôtre.{/n} « Vous m'avez suggéré d'écouter ma suite, mais vous, qu'avez-vous à dire ? Êtes-vous aussi d'avis qu'il est possible de négocier avec un grox enragé ? »

languages.text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente llama tu atención.{/n} «Me ha sugerido escuchar a mi séquito, pero ¿qué opina usted? Cree, como el resto, que se puede negociar con un grox rabioso?».
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

traits.locale_text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente llama tu atención.{/n} «Me ha sugerido escuchar a mi séquito, pero ¿qué opina usted? Cree, como el resto, que se puede negociar con un grox rabioso?».

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacir, gözlerini yakalıyor.{/n} "Maiyetimi dinlememi önermiştin. Sen ne diyeceksin? Sen de kuduz bir groksla pazarlık yapılabileceğini mi düşünüyorsun?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Hür Tacir, gözlerini yakalıyor.{/n} "Maiyetimi dinlememi önermiştin. Sen ne diyeceksin? Sen de kuduz bir groksla pazarlık yapılabileceğini mi düşünüyorsun?"

languages.text: {n}Der Freihändler erwidert deinen Blick.{/n} "Ihr habt mir geraten, auf mein Gefolge zu hören. Aber was habt Ihr selbst zu sagen? Denkt Ihr auch, dass man mit einem tollwütigen Grox verhandeln kann?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Freihändler erwidert deinen Blick.{/n} "Ihr habt mir geraten, auf mein Gefolge zu hören. Aber was habt Ihr selbst zu sagen? Denkt Ihr auch, dass man mit einem tollwütigen Grox verhandeln kann?"

languages.text: {n}ローグトレーダーが君の目を引く.{/n} 「君が言うように、側近の意見を聞くべきだと？ じゃあ、君はどう思う？ 狂ったグロックスと交渉できると思う？」
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader catches your eye.{/n} "You suggested I listen to my retinue. But what do you have to say? Do you, too, think one can negotiate with a rabid grox?"

traits.locale_text: {n}ローグトレーダーが君の目を引く.{/n} 「君が言うように、側近の意見を聞くべきだと？ じゃあ、君はどう思う？ 狂ったグロックスと交渉できると思う？」
